overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a player character walking through a neon-lit food stall at night, interacting with the environment, and climbing onto the rooftop to traverse above a busy cyberpunk street filled with pedestrians and holographic advertisements.

scene_state.functional_zone: cyberpunk food stall interior with neon lighting

agents.ego_description: walking through the narrow food stall interior, approaching the service counter

notable_agents.action: vendor standing behind the counter preparing food
customer sitting on green stool at the counter

entered.detail: food stall with metal counter and cooking equipment
tall red vertical banner with white logo text
illuminated yellow neon sign reading COCKTAIL
metal cooking surface with steam and food preparation items
person in pink pants sitting on green stool at counter

segments.scene_description: The player moves through a narrow cyberpunk food stall interior, passing by a seated customer and approaching the vendor behind a metal counter. The space is lit by warm artificial lights and neon signs, with a red Megabites banner visible on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow back alley behind food stalls

events.description: exits the food stall interior into the narrow back alleyway
begins climbing up onto the roof of the food stall

agents.ego_description: moving past the vendor through the back of the stall and climbing onto the roof

notable_agents.action: vendor in colorful jacket moving aside as player passes behind counter

entered.detail: dark concrete wall with graffiti and storage items
metal shelving unit with containers and supplies
opening leading to the street with visible neon lights

segments.scene_description: The player exits through the back of the food stall into a narrow alley, passing the vendor and storage areas. The lighting shifts to a mix of interior warmth and exterior neon glow as the player approaches the alley opening and begins climbing onto the roof.

events.description: moving along the rooftop edge overlooking the street below
view opens to reveal busy pedestrian street with holographic advertisements

agents.ego_description: traversing the rooftop edge while observing the busy street below

entered.detail: flat tar-covered roof surface with metal vents
busy pedestrian street visible from elevated perspective
large glowing holographic advertisements on building facades
glowing blue vending machine on the street below

segments.scene_description: From the rooftop vantage point, the player moves along the edge overlooking a bustling cyberpunk street filled with pedestrians and bright holographic advertisements. The perspective shifts from ground-level intimacy to an elevated view of the neon-drenched urban environment below.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the intimate, warm interior of a food stall to an expansive, elevated view of a neon-drenched city. It begins by navigating a narrow stall, passing a seated customer and a red Megabites banner while approaching a vendor behind a metal counter. As the camera moves past the vendor and through storage areas, the scene shifts from the interior warmth into a dim alleyway illuminated by an exterior neon glow. The perspective then ascends as the camera climbs onto a rooftop, transitioning from the confined ground-level space to a high vantage point. Finally, the view opens up to overlook a bustling cyberpunk street filled with pedestrians and towering holographic advertisements.
